# S3CleanupJobComponent

Delete S3 objects older than N days under a prefix — cost control + compliance retention.

## Dependencies
- `boto3`

## What this is
A **Dagster job** (no asset materialized) — the component installs a `dg.job`
plus an optional schedule. Lineage graph stays clean; the work happens
behind the scenes.

## See also
- [Schema](schema.json) · [Example config](example.yaml)

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `job_name` | `str` | Dagster job name |
| `bucket` | `str` | S3 bucket name |
| `older_than_days` | `int` | Delete objects older than this many days |

### Catalog metadata

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `tags` | `dict` | — | Dagster job tags |

### Sensor configuration

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `default_status` | `str` | `"STOPPED"` | STOPPED \| RUNNING |

### Source / target

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `prefix` | `str` | — | Object prefix to scope cleanup |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `schedule` | `str` | — | Cron schedule (None = no schedule) |
| `region_name` | `str` | `"us-east-1"` | — |
| `aws_profile` | `str` | — | — |
| `dry_run` | `bool` | `false` | Report what would be deleted without deleting |
